news-korea-econ.title: DHS Sec Mullin points finger at Newsom over alleged Chinese infiltration of California after CCP mayor charged
news-korea-econ.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin blames Gov. Gavin Newsom's policies for leading to alleged Chinese infiltration of California after a local mayor was charged as a China agent.

news-global-econ.title: E.U. to Ban Brazilian Meat Imports from September over Use of Antibiotics
news-global-econ.description: The European Union (E.U.) is set to ban Brazilian meat imports on September 3 over the use of antibiotics to stimulate growth unless producers show compliance with safety regulations before the deadline — an announcement that comes roughly two weeks after the…

news-global-econ.title: Netflix co-CEO clarifies streaming giant’s live sports strategy amid NFL lineup expansion, federal scrutiny
news-global-econ.description: Ted Sarandos says Netflix is not pursuing full-season sports rights as the streaming giant expands its live NFL and sports event offerings in 2026.

news-global-econ.title: Doug Burgum says Trump enters China summit in 'strongest position' of any US leader ever
news-global-econ.description: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum says Trump enters China summit in the "strongest position" of any U.S. leader, citing energy dominance and food security.

news-global-econ.title: Dallas mayor blasts NYC for ‘punishing success' as he pitches ‘Y’all Street’ to fleeing billionaires
news-global-econ.description: Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson touts "Y'all Street" as a rising rival to Wall Street, blasting NYC Mayor Mamdani for what he calls punishing success.

news-global-econ.title: Trump faces split among retired US commanders over whether to resume Iran strikes
news-global-econ.description: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on "massive life support" as retired U.S. commanders debate whether to resume military operations against Tehran.

news-korea-soc.title: DHS Sec Mullin points finger at Newsom over alleged Chinese infiltration of California after CCP mayor charged
news-korea-soc.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin blames Gov. Gavin Newsom's policies for leading to alleged Chinese infiltration of California after a local mayor was charged as a China agent.

news-global-soc.title: Trump heads to Beijing for high-stakes Xi talks as Taiwan tensions, trade disputes test US strength
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump meets with Xi Jinping in Beijing for talks on Taiwan, trade, Iran and China's support for Russia amid rising U.S.–China tensions.

news-global-soc.title: Trump heads to China with the upper hand — and Xi knows it
news-global-soc.description: President Trump's economic policies on trade, energy and manufacturing position the U.S. to negotiate with China from a place of unprecedented strength.

news-global-soc.title: Murphy: Trump Has Made Iran Two to Three Times More Powerful
news-global-soc.description:
Tuesday on MS NOW's "All In," Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) claimed President Donald Trump's military operation in Iran has made them "two to three times more powerful."

news-global-soc.title: New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill announces another NJ Transit World Cup ticket cut days after first reduction
news-global-soc.description: NJ Transit 2026 FIFA World Cup train ticket prices cut again to $98 round-trip after Gov. Mikie Sherrill revealed sponsors that helped lower costs for fans.
